reason: Force push can overwrite upstream work and cause data loss
alternative: Use normal git push or git push --force-with-lease after git pull

reason: Installing without saving to package.json breaks reproducibility
alternative: Use npm install (saves to package.json by default)
Use npm scripts or configure environment variables through CI/CD

reason: Hardcoded API keys expose credentials in source code
Hardcoded passwords expose credentials in source code
alternative: Use environment variables or secrets management
